name: Support AI Assistant
description: AI-powered support tools including ticket summarization, solution suggestions, reply drafting, sentiment detection, and Knowledge Base article generation. 5 AI tools with different parameter patterns.
author: Your Name

config.readme:
# Support AI Assistant Plugin

5 AI tools that supercharge your support team.

## AI Tools

| Tool | What it does | Parameters |
|------|-------------|-----------|
| Summarize Ticket | Creates concise ticket summaries | ticketId, format |
| Suggest Solution | Finds likely solutions | ticketId, maxSuggestions |
| Draft Reply | Writes customer replies | ticketId, tone, notes |
| Detect Sentiment | Analyzes customer mood | ticketId |
| Generate KB Article | Creates help articles | ticketId, title, category |

## What it demonstrates

- 5 AI tools with different parameter patterns
- Select, number, and string parameter types
- Model extensions on the `ticket` entity
- Webhook subscription to support events
- Dashboard widgets
